subject: Re: Warp dies with newly trained dataset
body:
Hi, 

I have two Quadro P5000. The generic network runs but the results are bad. 

YH

On Wednesday, July 18, 2018 at 9:54:07 AM UTC+2, Dimitry Tegunov wrote:
>
> Hi,
>
> could you please describe the GPUs in your system? Does the supplied 
> generic BoxNet version crash the same way?
>
> Cheers,
> Dimitry
>
>
> On Tuesday, July 17, 2018 at 5:14:53 PM UTC+2, yongh...@gmail.com 
> <javascript:> wrote:
>>
>>
>> Hi,  
>>
>> I tried boxnet and retrained the network with hand picked data. This 
>> behaved as expected and gave a similar curve as shown in the tutorial. But 
>> once I tried to run the new network on a new micrograph warp crashes and 
>> shuts down without error message. What did I do wrong?
>>
>>
>>
